channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 17.5%.

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
The Guardian: Streeting and Burnham accuse Blair of failing to confront inequality in Labour criticism - The Guardian
item.description: Streeting and Burnham accuse Blair of failing to confront inequality in Labour criticism - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Revealed: Mandelson vetting warned of ties to senior figures in China, Russia and Israel
item.description: Revealed: Mandelson vetting warned of ties to senior figures in China, Russia and Israel

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Side-note: a funny quirk of this leadership election (yes we are already in one) is that everyone in it, Andy Burnham, Keir Starmer, Wes Streeting, is explicitly against the policy choice at the heart of actually exis...
item.description: Side-note: a funny quirk of this leadership election (yes we are already in one) is that everyone in it, Andy Burnham, Keir Starmer, Wes Streeting, is explicitly against the policy choice at the heart of actually exis...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: We’re all Millibandites now: Wes Streeting fires back at Tony Blair, as you’d expect on tax, but also echoes the core post-2010 critique of Blairism that it wasn’t insufficiently focused on inequality:
item.description: We’re all Millibandites now: Wes Streeting fires back at Tony Blair, as you’d expect on tax, but also echoes the core post-2010 critique of Blairism that it wasn’t insufficiently focused on inequality:

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
The Guardian: Revealed: Mandelson vetting warned of ties to senior figures in China, Russia and Israel - The Guardian
item.description: Revealed: Mandelson vetting warned of ties to senior figures in China, Russia and Israel - The Guardian

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: NEW - Wes Streeting writes for the Guardian tonight in the first of the detailed responses to Blair.
He says there is a “striking weakness” at the heart of the essay which is the anger stoked by inequality - voters ...
item.description:
NEW - Wes Streeting writes for the Guardian tonight in the first of the detailed responses to Blair.
He says there is a “striking weakness” at the heart of the essay which is the anger stoked by inequality - voters ...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: It is baffling to see people look at the one effective thing Starmer has done (create a thumping great majority largely consisting of people he chose who will give him the votes he needs on essentially anything you co...
item.description: It is baffling to see people look at the one effective thing Starmer has done (create a thumping great majority largely consisting of people he chose who will give him the votes he needs on essentially anything you co...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Key questions over Mandelson vetting: did ‘mitigations’ cover links to China and Russia?
item.description: Key questions over Mandelson vetting: did ‘mitigations’ cover links to China and Russia?
